text: All fees collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.178 — Disposition of Fees

All fees collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 13, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: All fees collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
